$comment: Source-of-truth manifest for Wave-2 dialogue SFX. Used by scripts/generate-dialogue-sfx.mjs to (re)generate the 12 files via the Google Gemini API. Edit prompts here, then re-run the generator. Outputs land at public/audio/dialogue/<key>.ogg and are committed.
style: modern sci-fi UI sound effect, sub-1.5 seconds, mono, subtle but unambiguous valence. No vocal samples. No music.

sfx.prompt: A soft synth chime — single neutral attention cue. Warm sine wave with a brief shimmer overtone. 0.6s total. Modern sci-fi UI open.
GNN news broadcast sting — three-tone descending arpeggio (E5-C5-A4) on a clean digital synth, slight reverb tail. 0.9s. Cable-news-channel ID feel.
Muted klaxon pulse — two beats of a low-pass-filtered sine sweep around 440Hz, urgent but not piercing. 0.7s. Spaceship bridge alarm at low volume.
Paper-rustle into a low confirm tone — brief brown-noise sweep transitioning into a soft 220Hz sine tap. 0.8s. Boardroom memo arriving on a terminal.
Confident mechanical click followed by a rising perfect fifth on a clean synth (C5 to G5). 0.8s. Crisp engineering-bay 'task complete' cue.
Warm major chord swell (C major triad) on smooth synth pads with harmonious overtones, fades quickly. 1.0s. Treaty-signing flourish.
Crisp digital coin shimmer ascending arpeggio — three quick bell hits ascending an octave. 0.6s. Stock-ticker green-tick.
Bright synth bell, single sustained note (A5) with slight chorus and short reverb. 0.9s. Story-beat resolved positively.
Hydraulic hiss into a low thud — short white-noise burst with low-pass envelope, ending on a 60Hz sub-bass thump. 0.8s. Equipment failure cue.
Dissonant minor second chord (C and Db) on synth, brief tense flutter, no resolution. 0.7s. Diplomatic incident sting.
Sharp downward glissando — single descending tone from C5 to A3 on a slightly distorted square wave. 0.6s. Market crash blip.
Hollow descending synth pad — two-note minor third dropping (F4 to D4) with airy reverb tail. 1.0s. Story-beat gone wrong.
